label: CeFi/TradFi Strategy Config
description: Configure CeFi, TradFi, Options, and Prediction strategies — momentum, mean-reversion, ML, stat-arb, market-making.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper covers all grid widgets.

0.6.note: pure config form with no data context dependency.

0.7.note: schema missing case shows fallback message inline.

0.8.note: pure form, no data context, no error surface needed.

0.9.note: replaced dead React.useState for mode (never mutated) with plain const.

l0.notes: All checks pass/n/a. 0.9 fixed prior session — mode was useState, now plain const.

1.1.note: pure UI form; all data is local state + lib/config/ schemas (no domain context).

1.7.note: CEFI_STRATEGY_FAMILIES and CEFI_STRATEGY_SCHEMAS are in lib/config/strategy-config-schemas/ (correct location).

l1.notes: Widget is a pure UI form over lib/config/ schemas. Scope filtering intentionally absent.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if entitlements change.

3.1.note: Mode relevance: live ✓ (deploy live configs), paper ✓ (widget shows 'Paper' mode badge), batch ✗ (N/A — config form is always interactive).

3.2.note: Widget reads mode via useExecutionMode() (line 39) — modeLabel derived from isLive/execMode. No hardcoded mode string remains.

3.5.note: Paper mode: Deploy button toast says 'deployed in Paper mode' — mode string flows into toast message.

3.3.note: Human verify: in batch mode, verify Deploy/Save buttons behavior (currently always enabled).

3.4.note: Human verify: mode badge shows correct mode.

l3.notes: Agent checks done. Mode now read from useExecutionMode(); modeLabel maps live/paper/batch. Human must verify 3.3, 3.4.

4.1.note: Save Config, Deploy, Promote buttons all have toast.success handlers — functional (mock-level).

4.6.note: No entitlement checks in render path.

4.3.note: Human verify: SchemaForm renders all required fields for each CeFi strategy type.

4.4.note: Human verify: Save/Deploy/Promote toasts fire correctly.

4.7.note: Human verify: strategy Select dropdown renders all families and strategies.

4.8.note: Human verify: form scrolls within widget bounds when many fields.

l4.notes: Agent checks pass. Human must verify 4.3, 4.4, 4.7, 4.8.

5.1.note: Target strategies: all CeFi/TradFi strategy families defined in CEFI_STRATEGY_FAMILIES — momentum, mean-reversion, ML, stat-arb, cross-exchange, market-making, commodity-regime, event-macro, options, predictions. This widget is the primary config surface for these strategies.

l5.notes: 5.1 documented. Human must walk through 5.2-5.6 for each strategy family.

l6.notes: L6 not started — deferred until L5 human walkthrough complete.

7.1.note: cefi-strategy-config-widget.tsx:74 — border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/5 text-blue-400 are Tailwind color utilities (not hex/rgb/hsl literals). These pass the grep pattern (no rgb() or #hex), but use direct color names instead of semantic tokens. Deferred — semantic token for 'info callout' not defined in globals.css.
7.1.deferReason: missing token — requests --color-info or info-callout semantic token for informational callout backgrounds

7.2.note: No mock data in widget; schemas from lib/config/.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: loadInitialConfigs() called as useState initializer (correct). No inline objects in deps.

l7.notes: 7.1 note on blue-* Tailwind utilities (not grep violations but non-semantic). 7.5 globally deferred.

8.1.note: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on group label div (line 56). --text-micro (0.625rem/10px) is defined in globals.css @theme inline block.
8.1.fix: Replaced text-[10px] → text-micro on Select group label div.

8.3.note: Uses Button (ui), Select (ui), Badge (ui), SchemaForm (shared). Shared primitives used.

8.4.note: label element present for Strategy select (line 48). No bare interactive divs. Buttons are semantic.

8.5.note: Human verify: renders at minW=3, minH=4.

l8.notes: 8.1 fixed (text-micro token applied). 8.2-8.4 pass. 8.5 human-verify pending.

keepSeparate.rationale: CeFi/TradFi config is distinct from DeFi strategy config (different schema families). Keeping separate allows schema-driven form specialization per domain.

relationships.notes: Config widget drives Deploy/Save actions. No downstream detail widgets wired yet — strategy selection in this widget could drive a detail panel in future. Currently standalone.

dataContract.notes: Config schemas served from lib/config/strategy-config-schemas/ (local). Save/Deploy toasts are mock — no real API call. Production: POST to strategy configuration service.

gaps: Save/Deploy are mock toast-only — no real API integration
Promote from backtest not wired to backtest service
coverage.notes: Widget covers all CeFi/TradFi strategy families via schema-driven form. Mode badge is cosmetic only.

knownIssues: 567 lines (legacy) refactored to 125 via schema-driven form

findings.description: cefi-strategy-config-widget.tsx — mode was React.useState but setter never used; replaced with plain const
findings.fix: Replaced useState with const mode = 'Paper' as 'Paper' | 'Active'

findings.description: cefi-strategy-config-widget.tsx:74 — border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/5 text-blue-400 use direct Tailwind color utilities instead of semantic tokens for info callout
findings.deferReason: missing token — requests --color-info semantic token (or info-surface variant) for informational callout backgrounds

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: cefi-strategy-config-widget.tsx:56 — text-[10px] arbitrary font-size on group label div; no text-2xs token in globals.css
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro (--text-micro=0.625rem/10px) on Select group label div.
